proposedIntegration.expectedTransactionProfile: Institutional payment-rail onboarding for Nova Bank Online (Anakatech LLC operator) with Malta entity Nova Bank Malta Ltd; OpenPayd EMI partner; Hybx/Fineract core banking; SWIFT sandbox readiness.
proposedIntegration.sourceOfFundsDescription: Operating capital and client settlement flows of Nova Bank Online / Anakatech LLC fintech platform; fiat rails via licensed EMI partner (OpenPayd) and institutional Fineract (Hybx Finance); no retail cash deposits at Nova branches.
proposedIntegration.sanctionsExposureNotes: Nova Bank Online runs KYC/AML/CFT program (public docs slug kyc). Sanctions screening is part of the platform compliance posture; no intentional sanctions exposure.
proposedIntegration.bankName: OpenPayd (EMI partner) / Other — confirm settlement account with compliance
